title: Protocol for capture and concentration of viruses from wastewater samples (up to 50 mL)   using Magnetic Nanotrap® particles.

steps: Place a 50 mL conical tube on a tube rack.
Add 50 mL of wastewater sample to the conical tube.
Let the wastewater sample sit on the benchtop at Room temperature for 00:10:00 . This will allow large aggregates to settle at the bottom of the tube.
Use a pipet to transfer 40 mL of the top clear supernatant, without disturbing the sediment pellet, into a new conical tube.
Add 600 µL of Nanotrap partircles to the sample, and invert 2-3 times to mix the particles.
Incubate samples with Nanotrap particles at Room temperature for 00:20:00 .
Use a magnetic rack to separate the Magnetic Nanotrap® particles from the sample. 00:05:00
Discard the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet. If required use a small pipet to remove all the supernatant from the tube.
Add 140 µL of 1X PBS to the particle pellet.
Add 560 µL of Qiagen lysis buffer from the QIAamp Viral RNA kit to the sample and resuspend the mix by votexing the tube briefly.
Incubate the sample at Room temperature for 00:10:00 .
Use a magnetic rack to separate the Magnetic Nanotrap® particles from the sample. 00:00:30
Collect the supernatant in a 2 mL microcentrifuge tube and discard the pellet.
Add 560 µL of 100 % volume ethanol to samples, briefly vortex to ensure the sample is properly mixed.
Add 630 µL of the sample mix onto QIAamp Mini column and close the cap.
Centrifuge the sample for 6000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute .
Place the QIAamp Mini column into a clean 2 mL collection tube,and discard the tube containing the filtrate.
Add the remaining sample from step 14 onto the QIAamp Mini column and close the cap
Centrifuge the sample for 6000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute .
Place the QIAamp Mini column into a clean 2 mL collection tube,and discard the tube containing the filtrate.
Open the QIAamp Mini column and add 500 µL of Buffer AW 1.
Centrifuge the sample for 6000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute .
Place the QIAamp Mini column into a clean 2 mL collection tube and discard the tube containing the filtrate.
Open the QIAamp Mini column and add 500 µL of Buffer AW 2.
Centrifuge the sample for 20000 x g, Room temperature, 3 minutes .
Place the QIAamp Mini column into a clean 2 mL collection tube,and discard the tube containing the filtrate.
Centrifuge the sample for 20000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute to remove any Buffer AW2 carryover.
Place the QIAamp Mini column into a clean 2 mL collection tube,and discard the tube containing the filtrate.
QIAamp Mini column and add 60 µL of Buffer AVE and incubate at Room temperature for 00:03:00 .
Centrifuge the sample for 6000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute .
The eluate collected in the collection tube is ready for analysis.
Use any SARS-CoV-2 RT-PCR detection kit. Follow manufacturer instructions to set up the RT- PCR. The sample elution can be used for wastewater survillance using MINion or other sequencing platforms.
